questions.question: What does v-memo do in a v-for list?
options: Memoizes the entire list and re-renders it only once
Skips re-rendering a list item's subtree when the dependency array values are unchanged
Caches the list data in localStorage between renders
Prevents new items from being added to the list reactively

questions.question: When should you use shallowRef instead of ref for an object?
options: When you need deep mutation tracking on nested properties
When working with primitive values only
When you replace the object wholesale and don't mutate nested properties
When the object is used inside a Pinia store

questions.question: What Vue DevTools tab is the best starting point for diagnosing runtime re-render performance problems?
options: Performance tab showing component render times and re-render counts
